title: Platyclinis latifolia
taxonomy: Platyclinis latifolia is classified within the family Calycanthaceae. It is a plant native to western North America. The species has been reclassified from a member of the family Staphylocarpus to the family Calycanthaceae. This change in classification reflects the most up-to-date understanding of its botanical relationships. Further research may continue to refine our understanding of its classification.
